mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 250 (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing equity discount rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 250 despite rate hike expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll employment (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 for any 3-year window where both INDPRO and PAYEMS show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) combined with rising retail sales (RSAFS) indicate elevated demand pressures, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX underperforms by >2% in 60-day periods where both HOUST and RSAFS exceed their 90th percentile.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) below 4% signals tight labor markets, increasing corporate pricing power and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE remains below 4%.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening cycle characterized by rising FEDFUNDS and declining GDP growth (GDPC1) generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX outperforms by >1.5% in 20-day periods where both FEDFUNDS exceeds 3% and GDP contracts.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) amid declining capacity utilization signals overheating supply chains, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 110.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1) combined with rising housing starts (HOUST) indicates demand-side weakness offset by construction activity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX underperforms by >2% in 20-day periods where GDP contracts and housing starts exceed 1200.
